title: audit — subprocessors (GDPR Art. 28)
description: Third-party services that process tenant subject data on behalf of Academorix as part of the audit lane. Only one meaningful subprocessor: the S3 archive storage provider (AWS S3 or region-specific equivalent) that holds cold-tier + regulator export payloads. The vendor `owen-it/laravel-auditing` PHP package is a code dependency (in-process), NOT a subprocessor (it doesn't leave our infrastructure).

subprocessors.name: AWS S3 (Simple Storage Service)
subprocessors.region: us-east-1 (default) / eu-west-1 (EU tenants) / configurable per-tenant via config.audit.export.archive_bucket_env resolution
subprocessors.purpose: Cold-tier storage for audit rows past the 90d hot window (Enterprise). Regulator export payload delivery. Erasure archive storage (subprocess for audit-preservation on tenant erasure). All uploads use S3 object-lock in compliance mode with encryption at rest (SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS per bucket policy).
data_categories: audit rows (event, auditable_type, auditable_id, user_type, user_id, old_values jsonb, new_values jsonb, tenant_id, application_id, created_at)
regulator export payloads (same, chunked by tenant + application + date range)
erasure archive manifests (tenant_id, erasure_event_id, row_count, sha256)
subprocessors.region_selection_note: EU-based tenants get their archive bucket in eu-west-1 with SCC-covered inter-region transfers explicitly disabled. Regulator-shaped exports for EU tenants stay in eu-west-1. US tenants default to us-east-1. Regional pinning honored per config.audit.export.archive_bucket_env resolution which is tenant-scoped.

in_process_dependencies_note: The following are CODE dependencies, not subprocessors — they run inside our containers and never leave our infrastructure boundary:

in_process_dependencies.name: owen-it/laravel-auditing
in_process_dependencies.role: Vendor PHP package. Provides the Auditable trait + AuditableObserver + base Audit model shape. All operations are in-process (Postgres reads + writes on our own DB). No data leaves our infrastructure.

in_process_dependencies.name: spatie/laravel-data
in_process_dependencies.role: DTOs for wire projections. No data leaves our infrastructure.
